title: WatchlistDecision
description: AI-generated watchlist update payload consumed by the Signal Forge Discord listener. Post this as raw JSON or as a .json file attachment to the configured trading channel.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC datetime when the AI generated this decision (e.g. 2024-01-15T14:30:00Z). The listener rejects payloads older than DISCORD_DECISION_MAX_AGE_SECONDS (default 900s).

source.description: Identifier for the agent or method that produced this decision.

symbols.description: The complete replacement watchlist. Every symbol present becomes ACTIVE; any previously ACTIVE symbol not listed is moved to INACTIVE (or MANAGED if it has an open position).

notes.description: Optional free-text narrative from the AI explaining the overall screening session.

asset_class.description: Asset class. Must match the monitor that will trade it.

reason.description: Concise AI-generated rationale for including this symbol as a long candidate.

confidence.description: AI confidence score for this selection (0.0 = weakest, 1.0 = strongest).

tags.description: Signal tags explaining why this symbol was selected.

price_at_decision.description: Last known market price at the moment this decision was generated.

symbols.reason: Strong earnings beat + analyst upgrades; price breaking above 52-week high on elevated volume.
Positive AI product news; trending in top gainers with sector rotation into mega-cap tech.

examples.notes: Screening run at US market open. Only including symbols with confluence of at least two signals and confidence >= 0.70.

symbols.reason: 24h volume +340% vs average; price reclaiming $50k support after failed breakdown.
Top 24h gainer on Kraken; trending upward with increasing buy-side order book depth.

examples.notes: Crypto screening — long-only. Excluded any pair with negative 7-day momentum or declining volume.
